name: Sweet Potato Banana Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine sugar, cornstarch, and nutmeg.
2. In a food processor or blender, puree the yams and ripe banana with evaporated milk until smooth.
3. Pour the purée into the saucepan. Cook, stirring constantly, over medium-high heat until the mixture comes to a boil.
4. Gradually stir about 1/2 cup of hot mixture into the beaten egg.
5. Return this to the pan and continue cooking, stirring until the mixture thickens.
6. Remove from heat; stir in butter and vanilla.
7. Cool slightly. Spoon into dessert dishes and chill.
8. Top with sliced banana.
Makes 4 servings.
